metadata.source: Full HTML audit: index.html, shop.html, modules.html, about.html, tribe.html, sustainability.html, product.html

slots.current_state: Real image present — approved Wave 1. Missing mint glow. Module rail thin. Flag for Wave 2 improvement.
slots.purpose: Above-the-fold conversion anchor. First impression of the brand.
slots.emotional_role: Immediate desire and trust — viewer must feel 'that is serious, expensive gear'
slots.commercial_role: Drives click to Build Your Pack. Without a compelling hero this page has no commercial gravity.
slots.alt_text: TrailVolt Core Pack modular backpack in Core Black — module attachment rail visible

slots.current_state: Image exists in ai-assets/images/line-card-everyday.webp — not yet inserted into HTML. Visual quality: strong composition (Dublin Georgian terrace, golden hour, woman walking). Pack visible, colourway correct. No module rail visible from this angle. No text on pack. Usable.
slots.purpose: Lifestyle trigger for the Everyday 22L line. Must make a commuter/professional buyer feel 'that is my pack'.
slots.emotional_role: Recognition — this is me, this is my Dublin/London/Barcelona morning
slots.commercial_role: Converts Everyday line browsers to product page visitors
slots.alt_text: Professional walking through Dublin with TrailVolt Everyday 22L Core Black — morning commute

slots.current_state: No image. Div is empty — class .line-card-v2__img-label exists but no img element.
slots.purpose: Lifestyle trigger for the Travel 30L line. Must make a frequent flyer buyer feel 'that pack goes where I go'.
slots.emotional_role: Liberation — no checked bag, no compromise, no limit to where you can go
slots.commercial_role: Converts travel-oriented buyers to the Travel 30L configuration
slots.alt_text: Traveller at airport departure gate with TrailVolt Travel 30L Slate Grey — carry-on ready
slots.source_basis: Trailvolt product concept / tribe archetype Marco Lazzarini

slots.current_state: Generated in ai-assets/images/regenerated/ — BLOCKED. 'TRAILVOLT' text appears on pack body. Hard brand policy violation. Must regenerate with hardened negative prompt.
slots.purpose: Lifestyle trigger for the Trail 28L line. Must trigger the feeling of a Saturday morning on the Wicklow Mountains.
slots.emotional_role: The call of the outdoors — real Irish terrain, earned moments
slots.commercial_role: Converts outdoor-lifestyle buyers to Trail 28L — the highest margin product
slots.alt_text: Hiker on Irish mountain trail with TrailVolt Trail 28L Forest Green — Wild Atlantic Way terrain
slots.source_basis: Trailvolt product concept / tribe archetype Aoife Murphy / brand-visual-foundation.md Environment 3

slots.current_state: Real image present — approved Wave 1. Radial layout, 8 modules, photographic mint lines. Strongest image in the set.
slots.purpose: Makes the TrailVolt product system instantly legible — one pack, eight modules, one frame.
slots.emotional_role: Clarity and excitement — the 'aha moment' image
slots.commercial_role: Removes cognitive friction about what the product is and how it works
slots.alt_text: TrailVolt modular system — Core Pack with all 8 snap-on modules arranged around it

slots.current_state: Div has label 'Product Image — Detail shot — materials & construction'. No img element.
slots.purpose: Material proof shot — communicates construction quality through close-up detail.
slots.emotional_role: Confidence — this is what premium construction looks like up close
slots.commercial_role: Proof shot for buyers who need tactile evidence before purchasing
slots.alt_text: TrailVolt Core Pack detail — 600D ballistic nylon weave, YKK zipper pull, module attachment rail connection point

slots.current_state: Div has label 'Sustainability Image — Materials & packaging detail'. No img element.
slots.purpose: Communicates the lifetime repair programme and ethical sourcing commitment.
slots.emotional_role: Responsibility — this brand thinks about longevity, not disposability
slots.commercial_role: Justifies the premium price through durability and repairability
slots.alt_text: TrailVolt spare parts — YKK zipper pull, Duraflex buckle, thread spool, module connector on dark surface

slots.current_state: Real image present — approved Wave 1. Excellent candid, workshop setting, correct props.
slots.purpose: Humanises the brand in the homepage founder teaser section.
slots.emotional_role: Trust — this was built by a real person who actually cares
slots.commercial_role: Converts sceptical first-time buyers who need a face behind the product
slots.alt_text: Ruslan, founder of TrailVolt, working on a pack prototype in his Dublin studio

slots.current_state: Real image in assets/images/ — approved Wave 1. Module rail clearly visible. Best product shot of the wave.
slots.purpose: Best seller card — last image before add-to-cart decision.
slots.emotional_role: Desirability — this is the one everyone wants
slots.commercial_role: Highest-converting product card. Direct revenue driver.
slots.alt_text: TrailVolt Everyday 22L Core Black modular backpack — best seller product shot
slots.source_basis: Trailvolt shop.html / brand-visual-foundation.md studio product section

slots.current_state: SVG placeholder active. Picture element wired — copying .webp will activate.
slots.purpose: Everyday 22L Slate Grey product card on shop page.
slots.emotional_role: Office-appropriate elegance — understated but clearly premium
slots.commercial_role: Secondary Everyday conversion — buyers who need professional appearance
slots.alt_text: TrailVolt Everyday 22L Slate Grey modular backpack

slots.purpose: Everyday 22L Forest Green product card.
slots.emotional_role: Understated outdoors — for buyers who want a nature connection in their daily carry
slots.commercial_role: Tertiary Everyday conversion
slots.alt_text: TrailVolt Everyday 22L Forest Green modular backpack

slots.purpose: Travel 30L Core Black product card — the clamshell-opening travel pack.
slots.emotional_role: Clean confidence — the packer who travels light and looks sharp
slots.commercial_role: Primary Travel line conversion
slots.alt_text: TrailVolt Travel 30L Core Black modular backpack — IATA cabin compliant

slots.purpose: Travel 30L Slate Grey — most popular for travel.
slots.emotional_role: Professional traveller — this pack works in every airport and boardroom
slots.commercial_role: Secondary Travel conversion
slots.alt_text: TrailVolt Travel 30L Slate Grey modular backpack

slots.purpose: Custom build product card — shows a configured Travel pack with modules attached.
slots.emotional_role: Personalisation — this is your exact setup
slots.commercial_role: Drives configurator visits and bundle purchases
slots.alt_text: TrailVolt Travel 30L Custom Build — pack with Tech Organizer and Power Bank modules attached

slots.purpose: Trail 28L Forest Green — the Trail favourite colourway product card.
slots.emotional_role: Outdoor ownership — this pack belongs on a real trail
slots.commercial_role: Primary Trail conversion — green colourway is the Trail bestseller
slots.alt_text: TrailVolt Trail 28L Forest Green modular backpack — Cordura 500D shell

slots.purpose: Trail 28L Core Black product card.
slots.emotional_role: Serious outdoor credential — the trail runner's black
slots.commercial_role: Secondary Trail conversion
slots.alt_text: TrailVolt Trail 28L Core Black modular backpack

slots.purpose: Trail 28L Slate Grey product card.
slots.emotional_role: Minimal outdoors — for the urban trail hybrid buyer
slots.commercial_role: Tertiary Trail conversion
slots.alt_text: TrailVolt Trail 28L Slate Grey modular backpack

slots.current_state: SVG placeholder active. Same slot exists on modules.html.
slots.purpose: Chest Phone Module product card — magnetic chest-mount, instant access.
slots.emotional_role: Immediate access — your phone always exactly where you need it
slots.commercial_role: Add-to-cart for €29 module
slots.alt_text: Chest Phone Module — magnetic chest mount for TrailVolt Core Pack

slots.purpose: Tech Organizer Module — cables, adapters, SD cards, pen loop.
slots.emotional_role: Order from chaos — every cable in its place
slots.commercial_role: Add-to-cart for €35 module
slots.alt_text: Tech Organizer Module — cables, adapters, SD cards organiser for TrailVolt

slots.purpose: Power Bank Module — 10,000mAh, USB-A + USB-C.
slots.emotional_role: Never stranded — always charged wherever you go
slots.commercial_role: Add-to-cart for €39 — highest-priced module
slots.alt_text: Power Bank Module — 10,000mAh integrated power bank for TrailVolt

slots.purpose: Shoe Module — ventilated isolated compartment.
slots.emotional_role: Separation and freshness — gym shoes never touch your laptop
slots.commercial_role: Add-to-cart for €32
slots.alt_text: Shoe Module — ventilated compartment for TrailVolt Core Pack

slots.purpose: Clothing Organizer Cube — compression cube, collapses flat.
slots.emotional_role: Pack more, carry less — efficient travel packing
slots.commercial_role: Add-to-cart for €25
slots.alt_text: Clothing Organizer Cube — compression packing cube for TrailVolt

slots.purpose: Hidden Document Sleeve — RFID-blocking, flush with back panel.
slots.emotional_role: Security without paranoia — your passport is safe and invisible
slots.commercial_role: Add-to-cart for €19
slots.alt_text: Hidden Document Sleeve — RFID-blocking document holder for TrailVolt

slots.purpose: Bottle Holder Module — side-swing, retracts when not in use.
slots.emotional_role: Hydration always accessible — trail-grade convenience
slots.commercial_role: Add-to-cart for €18
slots.alt_text: Bottle Holder Module — side-swing retractable holder for TrailVolt

slots.purpose: Rain Cover Module — stores in base pocket, full coverage.
slots.emotional_role: Irish weather preparedness — always ready, never caught out
slots.commercial_role: Add-to-cart for €22
slots.alt_text: Rain Cover Module — full-coverage weather protection for TrailVolt

slots.purpose: Bundle section image — shows multiple products together as an upsell visual.
slots.emotional_role: Complete solution — everything you need in one purchase
slots.commercial_role: Drives bundle purchases — highest AOV conversion on shop page
slots.alt_text: TrailVolt Core Pack with a curated selection of modules — the complete system

slots.current_state: SVG placeholder. JS swaps this src dynamically as line selection changes.
slots.purpose: Default product configurator image — Everyday line selected by default.
slots.emotional_role: This is what I'm building — real product visualisation
slots.commercial_role: The image the buyer stares at while choosing modules — must be flawless
slots.alt_text: TrailVolt Everyday 22L Core Pack — configurator view

slots.purpose: Product configurator image — Travel 30L selected.
slots.emotional_role: I can see what I'm buying
slots.commercial_role: Product visualisation for the Travel line
slots.alt_text: TrailVolt Travel 30L Core Pack — configurator view

slots.purpose: Product configurator image — Trail 28L selected.
slots.emotional_role: I can see what I'm buying for the trail
slots.commercial_role: Product visualisation for the Trail line
slots.alt_text: TrailVolt Trail 28L Core Pack — configurator view

slots.current_state: File exists in assets/images/ — picture element activated. Same file as index.html founder teaser.
slots.purpose: Founder portrait on about page — trust anchor for the full brand story.
slots.emotional_role: Trust and connection — this is Ruslan, the person who built this
slots.commercial_role: Converts sceptical first-time buyers on the about page
slots.alt_text: Ruslan, founder of TrailVolt, in the Dublin design studio

slots.purpose: Documents the real-world testing phase — Ruslan testing the Trail pack on Wicklow Mountains.
slots.emotional_role: Authenticity — this product was tested in the places it claims to work
slots.commercial_role: Proof of real-world development rigour
slots.alt_text: TrailVolt Trail pack testing in the Wicklow Mountains — prototype on early development trail

slots.purpose: Early workshop image — documenting the prototype development phase.
slots.emotional_role: Origin story — this is where it started
slots.commercial_role: Founder credibility through visible development process
slots.alt_text: Early TrailVolt prototype development — workshop materials and initial backpack builds

slots.purpose: The origin moment — Dublin Airport, the observation that sparked the product idea.
slots.emotional_role: The founding insight — one moment that changed everything
slots.commercial_role: Makes the brand story concrete and credible
slots.alt_text: Dublin Airport — the moment that inspired TrailVolt's modular system concept

slots.purpose: Current workshop — the production and design process in action.
slots.emotional_role: Craft in progress — this product is still being developed and improved
slots.commercial_role: Demonstrates active investment in the product beyond the initial launch
slots.alt_text: TrailVolt workshop — current development process with materials and hardware samples

slots.purpose: Aoife Murphy — Adventure Hiker, Donegal. Trail 28L, Wild Atlantic Way.
slots.emotional_role: I see myself — for outdoor-oriented women buyers
slots.commercial_role: Social proof for the Trail line via community storytelling
slots.alt_text: Aoife Murphy, Adventure Hiker, hiking the Wild Atlantic Way with TrailVolt Trail 28L

slots.purpose: Marco Lazzarini — Digital Nomad, Barcelona. Travel 30L.
slots.emotional_role: Freedom — 14 countries, one pack, no checked bag
slots.commercial_role: Social proof for the Travel line
slots.alt_text: Marco Lazzarini, Digital Nomad, at Barcelona airport with TrailVolt Travel 30L

slots.purpose: Sarah Kim — Product Designer, Dublin. Everyday 22L.
slots.emotional_role: Urban identity — gym, office, dinner — one pack that works everywhere
slots.commercial_role: Social proof for the Everyday line
slots.alt_text: Sarah Kim, Product Designer, cycling through Dublin with TrailVolt Everyday 22L

slots.purpose: Tomás Rivera — Trail Runner, Pamplona.
slots.emotional_role: Active duality — trails on weekends, flights on Mondays
slots.commercial_role: Social proof for Trail + Travel crossover buyers
slots.alt_text: Tomás Rivera, Trail Runner, on a Pyrenees trail with TrailVolt

slots.purpose: Nadia Voronova — Freelance Developer, Amsterdam. Early adopter.
slots.emotional_role: Community ownership — I helped build this
slots.commercial_role: Social proof for the tech-forward segment
slots.alt_text: Nadia Voronova, Freelance Developer, at an Amsterdam café with TrailVolt

slots.purpose: James Thornton — Architect, London. Longevity buyer.
slots.emotional_role: Investment — this pack looks better than the day I bought it
slots.commercial_role: Social proof for longevity/quality-focused buyers
slots.alt_text: James Thornton, Architect, at London Bridge with TrailVolt Everyday

slots.purpose: UGC-style community photo — Aoife at Cliffs of Moher.
slots.emotional_role: Real community — real people in real iconic locations
slots.commercial_role: Social proof through place recognition
slots.alt_text: Aoife at Cliffs of Moher with TrailVolt pack

slots.purpose: UGC-style — Marco at Lisbon Airport.
slots.emotional_role: Travel validation — the pack fits, no gate drama
slots.commercial_role: IATA compliance proof in action

slots.purpose: UGC-style — Sarah cycling in Dublin.
slots.emotional_role: Active urban identity

slots.purpose: UGC-style — Tomás on Pyrenees trail.
slots.emotional_role: Trail validation in real mountain terrain

slots.purpose: UGC-style — Nadia at Amsterdam café.
slots.emotional_role: Urban nomad aesthetic

slots.current_state: No OG image exists for index page. Referenced as trailvolt.com/assets/images/og-home.jpg but file missing.

slots.commercial_role: Drives click-through from social shares

batch_master_1.priority: CRITICAL — homepage missing slots + trail regen
batch_master_1.note: line-card-everyday.webp already generated and usable. line-card-trail.webp needs hardened negative prompt re: text on pack.
